title: Audit your numbers
excerpt: Use the Stripe Dashboard to examine the details of your revenue numbers. You can get a detailed view of accounting numbers from the Dashboard either by customers or by transactions for: - Each number in the [period summary report](https://docs.stripe.com/revenue-recognition/reports/period-summary.md) - Each number in the [revenue waterfall report](https://docs.stripe.com/revenue-recognition/reports/waterfall.md) - Each number in the AR aging summary report Choose a month in [the monthly summary section](https://dashboard.stripe.com/revenue-recognition) to get a report of the activity that occurred during that time.
